title: [FIRRTL] Advanced layer sink will sink RWProbeOps and cause verifier errors

features.name: RWProbe type with layer type parameter
features.description: Code should include a RWProbe type declaration with a layer type parameter, like RWProbe<UInt<1>, A> where A is a layer identifier

features.name: rwprobe function call on wire
features.description: Code should include a rwprobe() call that creates a reference probe from a wire, used with define keyword
features.snippet:
wire x : RWProbe<UInt<1>>
define x = rwprobe(w)

features.name: RWProbe definition inside layerblock referencing non-layered wire
features.description: Code should include a layerblock containing a RWProbe definition that references a wire without layer requirements, creating a layer mismatch

features.name: firrtl.ref.rwprobe with inner symbol targeting circuit-level wire
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.ref.rwprobe operation with an inner symbol reference targeting a wire that lacks layer requirements

features.name: RWProbe ref.cast from non-layered to layered type
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.ref.cast operation that converts a non-layered RWProbe to a layered RWProbe type inside a layer block
